requirements.text: WHEN a CR key is formatted for any ticket number, the system shall apply zero-padding with a minimum width of 3 digits using Math.max(3, String(num).length)
WHEN a CR key is formatted the system shall produce a key in format PROJECTCODE-NUMBER where NUMBER uses dynamic zero-padding
WHEN any module needs to format a CR key the system shall use the centralized formatCrKey function from shared/utils/keyNormalizer.ts
Existing ticket filenames on disk must not be renamed or moved
formatCrKey must be backward-compatible numbers 1-999 produce identical output to padStart(3,0)
All 10 identified padStart(3,0) call sites must be replaced with formatCrKey
Numbers at boundaries: formatCrKey MDT 1 returns MDT-001, formatCrKey MDT 999 returns MDT-999, formatCrKey MDT 1000 returns MDT-1000, formatCrKey MDT 10000 returns MDT-10000

formatCrKey must be a pure string operation with no measurable performance regression — function body must consist only of String(), Math.max(), and padStart() calls, no I/O, no async, no allocations beyond the return string

Frontend routing (src/utils/routing.ts, call site #8) must correctly route URLs containing 4-digit and 5-digit CR keys (e.g., /prj/MDT/ticket/MDT-1000). Quick search (src/hooks/useQuickSearch.ts, call site #9) must correctly pad partial numeric input to match 4-digit and 5-digit keys. Neither component must break layout when rendering keys longer than 3 digits.
requirements.sourceRef: E2E baseline + assess.md call sites #8 and #9

scenarios.title: CR key formatted with 3-digit padding at boundary 999
scenarios.when: a CR key is generated for ticket number 999
scenarios.then: the key is formatted as MDT-999

scenarios.title: CR key formatted with 4-digit number at 1000
scenarios.when: a CR key is generated for ticket number 1000
scenarios.then: the key is formatted as MDT-1000 with no truncation

scenarios.title: CR key formatted with 5-digit number at 10000
scenarios.when: a CR key is generated for ticket number 10000
scenarios.then: the key is formatted as MDT-10000 with no truncation

scenarios.title: CR key formatted with different project code
scenarios.when: a CR key is generated for ticket number 42
scenarios.then: the key is formatted as API-042

scenarios.title: CR key formatted with 3-digit padding for minimum boundary number 1
scenarios.when: a CR key is generated for ticket number 1
scenarios.then: the key is formatted as MDT-001

obligations.title: Implement and export formatCrKey(projectCode, number) in keyNormalizer.ts with dynamic padding Math.max(3, String(num).length) as a pure string operation
Replace padStart(3, '0') with formatCrKey in all production call sites (TicketService, routing.ts, useQuickSearch.ts)
Replace padStart(3, '0') with formatCrKey in all test helper and mock call sites
No existing ticket files on disk are renamed or moved as part of this change
Frontend routing and quick search must correctly handle URLs containing 4-digit and 5-digit CR keys without layout breakage

testPlans.title: formatCrKey unit tests: dynamic padding, format, backward compatibility, purity
routing.ts normalizeTicketKey handles 3-5 digit CR keys correctly (Edge-2 regression)
Verify all 10 padStart(3,'0') call sites replaced with formatCrKey (C3, BR-3 structural audit)
Verify no existing ticket files renamed or moved after formatCrKey migration (C1)

tasks.title: Implement formatCrKey in keyNormalizer.ts and make unit tests GREEN
Replace padStart(3,'0') in production call sites (TicketService, routing.ts, useQuickSearch.ts)
Replace padStart(3,'0') in test helpers and mocks + run structural audits
